klein.name: Klein Moretti
klein.epithet: A history graduate transmigrated into another's body, sharp-witted and cautious
klein.desc: Formerly Zhou Mingrui, an ordinary office worker who wakes up transmigrated into the body of Klein Moretti, a struggling history graduate in a gaslamp world of gods and mysticism. Pragmatic, quick to rationalize the bizarre, and driven above all by a desire to survive and return home.

melissa.name: Melissa Moretti
melissa.epithet: Klein's younger sister, an aspiring steam mechanic
melissa.desc: Klein's sharp, practical younger sister, a student at Tingen Technical School's Steam and Machinery department. Terse and undemonstrative, but quietly devoted to her family.

benson.name: Benson Moretti
benson.epithet: Klein's elder brother, the family's breadwinner
benson.desc: The eldest of the Moretti siblings, working long hours as a clerk at an import-export company to support his younger brother and sister after their parents' deaths.
